conceptClusters.title: Retrieved hierarchy models and fragment navigation
exitEvidence: Learner retrieves content-derived heading ranks, conforming parent-child relationships, descriptive destination purpose, and stable fragment behavior before creating page regions.
Learner repairs a changed outline, invalid relationship, repeated link purpose, and moved fragment target without copying earlier work.

conceptClusters.title: Landmark purpose exposure and naming
exitEvidence: Learner chooses header, nav, main, aside, and footer from page relationships and predicts landmark exposure from exact element context rather than position or tag presence.

Learner verifies one useful main region, bounded major navigation, contextual headers and footers, appropriate complementary content, and labels that distinguish repeated landmark purposes without redundant noise.

conceptClusters.title: Article section generic-group and heading relationships
exitEvidence: Learner selects article for independently distributable composition, section for thematic grouping normally worthy of a heading, div for generic styling or scripting groups, and existing landmark elements for their named purposes.
Learner verifies headings, standalone meaning, nesting, landmark exposure, and fragment behavior after content is split, merged, moved, or reused.

conceptClusters.title: Native disclosure label state grouping and boundaries
exitEvidence: Learner uses details with its first summary for additional information or controls, verifies boolean open state and native activation, and uses name grouping only when mutually exclusive access is justified.

Learner rejects details for menus, tabs, dialogs, footnotes, required always-visible content, or cases where exclusive closing harms comparison and verifies label, keyboard, focus, state, script-free, print, and changed-group behavior.

conceptClusters.title: Native control selection and custom-control burden
exitEvidence: Learner selects links, buttons, disclosures, and form controls from actual tasks before considering custom roles and records the user need when native behavior is insufficient.

Learner verifies role, accessible name, keyboard activation, focus, state, disabled or submission behavior, touch, zoom, script failure, and target browser-assistive-technology support rather than assuming an ARIA role creates behavior.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: An evidence map explains how an unseen public-information page becomes headings, valid relationships, destinations, landmarks, sectioning groups, disclosures, and native controls.
activityDesigns.startingState: A page brief, content outline, DOM snapshots, fragment traces, accessibility-tree extracts, disclosure states, and interaction traces are provided without decisions.
activityDesigns.completionState: The learner predicts and explains all seven concepts under changed context before guided authoring.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback contrasts the committed prediction with one observable relationship, state, or behavior and never substitutes a finished page.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Worked guidance reveals one reasoning transition at a time from content purpose to structure, exposure, state, or behavior.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires a revised prediction and a smaller changed trace before the model continues.

interactions.title: Retrieve content hierarchy
interactions.learnerAction: Predict heading ranks after an emergency-information subsection becomes a peer region and a notice becomes nested support.
interactions.artifactChange: A changed outline prediction is committed.

evidence.observable: Ranks follow content hierarchy with styles removed.
evidence.changedCase: The two regions exchange depth again.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Ranks follow visual size or sequential tag count.
interactions.correctionRoute: Reconstruct the content tree before choosing rank.

interactions.title: Retrieve valid relationships
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect candidate parents for headings, navigation, articles, disclosures, summaries, links, and interactive descendants before semantic classification.
interactions.artifactChange: A parent-child relationship map is saved.

evidence.observable: Accepted relationships satisfy exact content models and contextual restrictions.
evidence.changedCase: Summary and interactive descendants move to new parents.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visual indentation is treated as conformance evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Check content category and contextual author restriction.

interactions.title: Retrieve fragment behavior
interactions.learnerAction: Predict purpose, resolved target, heading context, visibility, focus state, and keyboard continuation after two page regions move.
interactions.artifactChange: A changed fragment trace is committed.

evidence.observable: Each link reaches one stable named target with coherent context and continuation.
evidence.changedCase: A target becomes disclosed content and its label changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Matching href and id tokens are accepted alone.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace activation through target visibility and continuation.

interactions.title: Inspect landmark exposure
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect how body-level and nested header and footer, major nav, main, aside, named section, and generic groups appear in a landmark inventory.
interactions.artifactChange: A context-sensitive landmark inventory is saved.

evidence.observable: Roles, names, hierarchy, repeated purposes, and absent contextual landmarks match the accessibility tree.
evidence.changedCase: A header moves inside an article and two nav purposes diverge.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Every semantic-looking element is counted as a landmark.
interactions.correctionRoute: Evaluate element context, implicit role, and naming.

interactions.title: Explain grouping decisions
interactions.learnerAction: Explain article, section, div, nav, aside, header, and footer choices for standalone reports, thematic chapters, styling wrappers, major navigation, and contextual support.
interactions.artifactChange: A grouping decision table is committed.

evidence.observable: Each choice names standalone reuse, thematic grouping, generic grouping, heading need, or landmark purpose.
evidence.changedCase: A reusable report becomes a styling-only wrapper.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Section replaces div whenever semantics are desired.
interactions.correctionRoute: Test standalone meaning, thematic outline, and purpose.

interactions.title: Predict disclosure behavior
interactions.learnerAction: Predict label, closed and open content, boolean state, keyboard activation, focus, toggle, exclusive name-group effects, and script-free behavior for three disclosures.
interactions.artifactChange: A native disclosure state trace is committed.

evidence.observable: First-summary labeling, additional content, open presence, activation, focus, grouping, and state transitions match native behavior.
evidence.changedCase: Independent disclosures become one exclusive group.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Triangle appearance is treated as complete behavior.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace label, DOM, state attribute, and activation.

interactions.title: Inspect native and custom burden
interactions.learnerAction: Compare a link, button, details-summary, form control, clickable div, and role-button across semantics, name, keyboard, focus, state, submission, disabled behavior, and script loss.
interactions.artifactChange: A control parity matrix is saved.

evidence.observable: Native behavior and every missing custom responsibility are demonstrated rather than assumed.
evidence.changedCase: Pointer input disappears and script fails.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Role and click handler are treated as native parity.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inventory every promised interaction responsibility.

interactions.title: Explain complete region model
interactions.learnerAction: Explain how hierarchy, content models, fragments, landmark exposure, sectioning relationships, disclosure state, and native behavior constrain one another after the brief changes.
interactions.artifactChange: The complete evidence map becomes the model checkpoint.

evidence.observable: Every claim links content purpose to DOM, exposed semantics, behavior, access, and changed evidence.
evidence.changedCase: A support article becomes main content with grouped optional details.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Element names substitute for relationships and behavior.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rebuild the weakest link from purpose to evidence.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A community resource guide accumulates coherent headings, valid relationships, purposeful fragments, useful landmarks, defensible content groups, native disclosures, and task-appropriate native controls.
activityDesigns.startingState: A verified resource brief, content cards, destination map, repeated-region cases, disclosure requirements, interaction requirements, and minimal valid document are provided.
activityDesigns.completionState: The saved guide passes all seven contracts, changed region and control cases, keyboard and touch tasks, script-free disclosure, narrow-width reflow, and reload persistence.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback names the first contradicted structure, exposure, state, behavior, or access observable and withholds final markup.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints progress from requirement classification to one evidence layer to a smaller parallel case and never reveal the final guide.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires diagnosis, bounded repair, and a changed guide case before the original checkpoint reopens.

interactions.title: Predict guide outline
interactions.learnerAction: Predict page and resource-section heading ranks from the guide brief before opening the editor.
interactions.artifactChange: An outline prediction is committed.

evidence.observable: Ranks match content hierarchy without CSS.
evidence.changedCase: A resource category becomes nested support.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Heading size or order count drives the prediction.
interactions.correctionRoute: Map content relationships before selecting ranks.

interactions.title: Inspect guide relationship limits
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect valid parents and children for structural regions, headings, summaries, interactive content, and nested articles before coding.
interactions.artifactChange: A relationship constraint list is saved.

evidence.observable: Every candidate relationship has a content-model decision and changed parent case.
evidence.changedCase: A summary moves after other flow content.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Browser recovery is accepted as author conformance.
interactions.correctionRoute: Use exact permitted context and content model.

interactions.title: Test initial resource fragments
interactions.learnerAction: Test resource links for purpose, unique target, heading context, visibility, focus, keyboard continuation, and changed section order.
interactions.artifactChange: Fragment baseline tests are stored.

evidence.observable: Every activation reaches an understandable stable target and continuation point.
evidence.changedCase: Two resource sections exchange positions.

interactions.feedbackTarget: URL hash change alone is accepted as success.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect destination context and post-navigation task.

interactions.title: Predict page-wide landmarks
interactions.learnerAction: Predict banner, navigation, main, complementary, contentinfo, and intentionally absent landmarks from page-wide purpose and context.
interactions.artifactChange: A page-landmark prediction is committed.

evidence.observable: Predicted roles and absences match element context and purpose.
evidence.changedCase: Page support moves inside an article.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Screen position determines landmark role.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify content relationship and DOM context.

interactions.title: Code site header and main
interactions.learnerAction: Code the guide's site-oriented header and one primary main region without converting article headers into banners.
interactions.artifactChange: Header and main structure are committed.

evidence.observable: One useful top-level banner and one primary main appear in the landmark inventory.
evidence.changedCase: An article receives its own contextual header.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Every header is labeled banner manually.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect implicit role by ancestor context.

interactions.title: Code major navigation regions
interactions.learnerAction: Code site and on-page navigation only for major link groups and associate visible purpose labels that distinguish their different destinations.
interactions.artifactChange: Two purposeful navigation regions are committed.

evidence.observable: Navigation roles, names, link sets, and destinations remain distinguishable.
evidence.changedCase: One link group becomes minor footer policy links.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Every group of links becomes a nav region.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate major navigation from incidental links.

interactions.title: Code complementary guidance
interactions.learnerAction: Code a separately meaningful support region as aside and leave unrelated or non-separable content in its proper main flow.
interactions.artifactChange: Complementary content is committed.

evidence.observable: Complementary role, relationship, name, and separated reading remain useful.
evidence.changedCase: The advice becomes required main procedure content.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visual sidebar placement always means aside.
interactions.correctionRoute: Test support relationship and separate meaning.

interactions.title: Code page and article footers
interactions.learnerAction: Code page-wide ownership information and contextual resource-card metadata with footer elements in correct scopes.
interactions.artifactChange: Page and contextual footer scopes are committed.

evidence.observable: Only page-wide footer is contentinfo; contextual footers remain associated content.
evidence.changedCase: Card metadata moves outside its article.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Every footer creates contentinfo.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect nearest sectioning ancestor and page scope.

interactions.title: Inspect repeated landmark names
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect repeated navigation and complementary regions for visible purpose, accessible names, identical versus different link sets, and redundant wording.
interactions.artifactChange: A repeated-landmark naming audit is saved.

evidence.observable: Different purposes have distinct concise names; identical repeated navigation retains consistent naming.
evidence.changedCase: Two navigation sets become identical.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Every landmark receives a unique arbitrary label.
interactions.correctionRoute: Name purpose, not role, and compare link sets.

interactions.title: Test landmark navigation
interactions.learnerAction: Navigate the guide by landmark inventory and heading navigation while checking order, usefulness, duplicates, context, and keyboard continuation.
interactions.artifactChange: Landmark and heading navigation evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Major regions are reachable, understandable, bounded, and paired with coherent headings.
evidence.changedCase: A named section becomes a generic group.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Landmark count is treated as quality metric.
interactions.correctionRoute: Remove noise and repair missing purposeful regions.

interactions.title: Explain landmark architecture
interactions.learnerAction: Explain every guide landmark, intentionally absent landmark, contextual header and footer, repeated-region label, and changed-context outcome.
interactions.artifactChange: A landmark decision record is committed.

evidence.observable: Each claim connects purpose, context, implicit role, name, navigation consequence, and mutation.
evidence.changedCase: Site navigation becomes article navigation.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Tag inventory replaces relationship evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rewrite one claim from purpose through exposure.

interactions.title: Predict standalone compositions
interactions.learnerAction: Predict which resource notices remain meaningful and reusable independently enough for article and which belong to one thematic group.
interactions.artifactChange: Standalone-composition predictions are committed.

evidence.observable: Article decisions follow independent composition rather than card appearance.
evidence.changedCase: A reusable notice becomes dependent instructions.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Every visual card becomes an article.
interactions.correctionRoute: Test independent distribution and meaning.

interactions.title: Code resource articles
interactions.learnerAction: Code independently reusable resource notices as articles with coherent headings and contextual metadata.
interactions.artifactChange: Resource articles are committed.

evidence.observable: Each article remains intelligible when extracted and retains valid hierarchy.
evidence.changedCase: One notice loses its standalone context.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Article is chosen because content looks like a card.
interactions.correctionRoute: Extract and test the composition independently.

interactions.title: Predict thematic sections
interactions.learnerAction: Predict which guide groupings are thematic outline entries normally introduced by headings and which are generic layout wrappers.
interactions.artifactChange: Thematic-group predictions are committed.

evidence.observable: Section choices correspond to meaningful outline topics, not styling hooks.
evidence.changedCase: A themed category becomes a layout column only.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Section is a more semantic div in every case.
interactions.correctionRoute: Ask whether the group belongs in the outline.

interactions.title: Code thematic resource sections
interactions.learnerAction: Code real resource categories as sections with content-derived headings and leave styling-only wrappers as divs.
interactions.artifactChange: Thematic and generic groups are committed.

evidence.observable: Outline, DOM, and grouping purpose agree after CSS removal.
evidence.changedCase: A category merges into adjacent content.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Every div is replaced with section.
interactions.correctionRoute: Retain only groups with thematic meaning.

interactions.title: Inspect section landmark exposure
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect when named sections become region landmarks and whether each is important enough for direct navigation without adding noise.
interactions.artifactChange: Section-to-region exposure evidence is saved.

evidence.observable: Named important sections expose useful regions; ordinary thematic groups do not receive redundant labels.
evidence.changedCase: A minor section becomes critical status content.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Every section is assumed to be a useful landmark.
interactions.correctionRoute: Test naming, importance, and navigation value.

interactions.title: Test extracted and merged groups
interactions.learnerAction: Extract articles, merge sections, remove styles, linearize content, and verify standalone meaning, thematic outline, generic wrappers, and contextual headers and footers.
interactions.artifactChange: Grouping mutation evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Every group retains its intended relationship after extraction or merge.
evidence.changedCase: Two articles merge into one thematic section.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Original page appearance proves grouping.
interactions.correctionRoute: Retest composition and outline roles.

interactions.title: Test grouping fragment stability
interactions.learnerAction: Move articles and sections while testing stable unique IDs, descriptive links, target headings, visibility, focus, and continuation.
interactions.artifactChange: Moved-group fragment evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Navigation follows stable identity rather than mutable text or source position.
evidence.changedCase: A section title changes after relocation.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Regenerated text-derived IDs are accepted.
interactions.correctionRoute: Preserve identity and retest full activation path.

interactions.title: Explain guide groupings
interactions.learnerAction: Explain every article, section, generic group, heading, landmark interaction, extraction result, and fragment consequence in the guide.
interactions.artifactChange: A grouping defense is committed.

evidence.observable: Each choice connects content relationship to outline, exposure, reuse, and mutation evidence.
evidence.changedCase: A reusable notice becomes page-specific support.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Semantic-sounding tags substitute for evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Defend one group under extraction and merge.

interactions.title: Predict optional-information disclosures
interactions.learnerAction: Predict whether additional eligibility notes and process details fit native disclosure while required warnings and primary tasks remain visible.
interactions.artifactChange: Disclosure suitability decisions are committed.

evidence.observable: Optional additional information uses disclosure; required content and other widget types are rejected.
evidence.changedCase: An eligibility note becomes a required warning.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Any collapsible appearance justifies details.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify information priority and widget type.

interactions.title: Code first-summary disclosures
interactions.learnerAction: Code valid details elements with the first summary as concise visible label followed by additional flow content.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent disclosure widgets are committed.

evidence.observable: DOM order, label, content relationship, closed and open states, and accessible exposure pass.
evidence.changedCase: A second summary is inserted before the intended label.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Any descendant summary labels details.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect the first summary child and remaining content.

interactions.title: Test native disclosure activation
interactions.learnerAction: Use keyboard, pointer, and touch to open and close each disclosure while tracking focus, boolean open presence, visible content, and toggle state.
interactions.artifactChange: Native activation traces are stored.

evidence.observable: All input methods operate one labeled control without focus loss or duplicate scripted activation.
evidence.changedCase: Script is disabled and pointer input is removed.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Click-only visual change proves disclosure behavior.
interactions.correctionRoute: Retest native activation and state without script.

interactions.title: Predict exclusive-group consequences
interactions.learnerAction: Predict open-state changes when disclosures share a non-empty name and decide whether comparison needs make exclusivity harmful.
interactions.artifactChange: Exclusive-group predictions and decision are committed.

evidence.observable: At most one group member remains open and the design decision accounts for simultaneous comparison.
evidence.changedCase: Learners must compare two resource requirements.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Accordion space saving is always beneficial.
interactions.correctionRoute: Test task need for simultaneous open content.

interactions.title: Code justified exclusive disclosure
interactions.learnerAction: Apply or refuse a shared details name, keep related members together under a heading, and prevent misleading multiple-open initial markup.
interactions.artifactChange: A justified grouped or independent disclosure set is committed.

evidence.observable: Grouping, heading, open-state invariant, and refusal rationale match the user task.
evidence.changedCase: The task changes from selection to comparison.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Shared names are added for visual consistency.
interactions.correctionRoute: Derive grouping from the information task.

interactions.title: Test disclosure persistence and reflow
interactions.learnerAction: Save, reload, print, zoom, narrow the viewport, expand long content, and verify labels, state expectations, reading order, focus, and full content access.
interactions.artifactChange: Disclosure persistence and layout evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Content remains understandable and operable across state, reload, print plan, zoom, and width changes.
evidence.changedCase: Summary doubles in length and content triples.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Desktop closed-state screenshot proves usability.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect state, reading, focus, and overflow separately.

interactions.title: Predict control choices
interactions.learnerAction: Choose link, button, details-summary, form control, or noninteractive content for navigate, command, disclose, submit, select, and inform tasks.
interactions.artifactChange: Task-to-control predictions are committed.

evidence.observable: Each control follows actual task behavior and native semantics.
evidence.changedCase: A command becomes navigation and a disclosure becomes required text.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visual style or generic click chooses control.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify task result before element choice.

interactions.title: Code navigation and commands natively
interactions.learnerAction: Code real destinations as links and in-page commands as buttons while preserving names, keyboard behavior, focus, and intended results.
interactions.artifactChange: Native links and buttons are committed.

evidence.observable: Navigation updates destination; commands act in place; both work through native activation.
evidence.changedCase: A command is replaced by an external destination.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Anchor and button are interchangeable after styling.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify resulting navigation or in-page action.

interactions.title: Inspect accessible control contracts
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect role, name, focusability, tab order, Enter and Space behavior, state, disabled behavior, submission, touch target, and zoom for every guide control.
interactions.artifactChange: A native control contract audit is saved.

evidence.observable: Every promised behavior is observable and no nested-interactive relationship remains.
evidence.changedCase: Button label becomes icon-only and one control is disabled.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Role and tabindex satisfy the entire contract.
interactions.correctionRoute: Test each semantic and behavioral responsibility.

interactions.title: Test pointer-free completion
interactions.learnerAction: Complete navigation, disclosure, command, and form-adjacent tasks using keyboard only while verifying focus visibility, order, activation, state, and return path.
interactions.artifactChange: Pointer-free task evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: All tasks complete without pointer emulation, hidden focus, or custom key gaps.
evidence.changedCase: Task order reverses after content moves.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Tab reachability alone proves operability.
interactions.correctionRoute: Run complete task outcomes with state checks.

interactions.title: Test script-loss behavior
interactions.learnerAction: Disable script and distinguish which native navigation, disclosure, and form behavior remains, which enhanced command degrades, and what content must stay available.
interactions.artifactChange: Script-loss task evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Native tasks retain defined behavior and enhancement failures remain honest and bounded.
evidence.changedCase: Network and script fail during an open disclosure.

interactions.feedbackTarget: No-script means every interactive task may disappear.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate baseline HTML behavior from enhancement.

interactions.title: Explain native-first decisions
interactions.learnerAction: Explain every native control choice, rejected custom role, behavior inventory, input-method result, state result, script-loss boundary, and changed task.
interactions.artifactChange: A native-first decision record is committed.

evidence.observable: Each claim links task, native behavior, custom burden, evidence, failure boundary, and mutation.
evidence.changedCase: Stakeholder requests a clickable div for styling convenience.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Native is asserted without behavior evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare exact task outcomes and responsibilities.

interactions.title: Run complete guide regression
interactions.learnerAction: Save, reload, move regions, rename visible headings, change fragment order, regroup disclosures, remove script, switch input, zoom, narrow, and retest all seven contracts.
interactions.artifactChange: The guide and complete regression suite become the workshop checkpoint.

evidence.observable: Saved hierarchy, relationships, destinations, exposure, groups, states, and native tasks survive every mutation.
evidence.changedCase: A parallel guide reverses region order and interaction priorities.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Initial visual match is treated as completion.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace the first broken invariant after each mutation.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A partially scaffolded festival bulletin becomes a structurally distinct, accessible page through fading support and changed-case checks.
activityDesigns.startingState: A different festival brief, incomplete outline, broken fragment map, partial page regions, mixed grouping candidates, disclosure facts, and native-task list are provided.
activityDesigns.completionState: The learner completes all seven concepts with only concept-level prompts and transfers them to a changed festival schedule.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback names failed evidence after commitment and does not supply final element or repair.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints begin at requirement category and fade to changed-case questions; completed code is never shown.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires a smaller parallel correction and changed festival case before retry.

interactions.title: Complete bulletin foundations
interactions.learnerAction: Complete heading ranks, valid structural parents, and stable purposeful fragment targets from the changed festival outline.
interactions.artifactChange: Prerequisite structure and navigation are committed.

evidence.observable: Outline, DOM, purpose, target visibility, focus, and continuation pass.
evidence.changedCase: Two event categories merge and one target moves.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Token presence substitutes for behavior and hierarchy.
interactions.correctionRoute: Repair outline, relationship, then activation evidence.

interactions.title: Complete bulletin landmarks
interactions.learnerAction: Complete page header, major navigation, one main, complementary travel guidance, and page footer from purpose and context.
interactions.artifactChange: Festival landmarks are committed.

evidence.observable: Roles, scopes, names, hierarchy, and intentional absences match the brief.
evidence.changedCase: Travel guidance becomes required main content.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Region position determines landmark choice.
interactions.correctionRoute: Reclassify relationship and ancestor context.

interactions.title: Test changed landmark purposes
interactions.learnerAction: Change navigation link sets, move a header into an article, and verify landmark roles, labels, duplicates, order, and usefulness.
interactions.artifactChange: Changed landmark evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Contextual roles and repeated names update without landmark noise.
evidence.changedCase: Two navigation sets become identical.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Every repeated role needs a different label.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare purposes and exact link sets.

interactions.title: Code festival compositions
interactions.learnerAction: Code reusable event notices as articles, thematic schedule categories as sections, and layout rows as generic groups.
interactions.artifactChange: Festival composition groups are committed.

evidence.observable: Extraction, outline, DOM, and styling-removal evidence match each group.
evidence.changedCase: An event notice becomes dependent schedule text.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visual card and row shapes select elements.
interactions.correctionRoute: Test standalone and thematic meaning.

interactions.title: Test festival grouping transfer
interactions.learnerAction: Extract, merge, move, rename, and expose festival groups while retesting headings, landmark noise, and fragment stability.
interactions.artifactChange: Grouping transfer evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Relationships remain correct after every content transformation.
evidence.changedCase: Two sections become one reusable article.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Original source order proves correct grouping.
interactions.correctionRoute: Re-evaluate composition after transformation.

interactions.title: Complete optional event details
interactions.learnerAction: Complete first-summary labels and additional content for optional venue notes while leaving essential cancellation information visible.
interactions.artifactChange: Festival disclosures are committed.

evidence.observable: Label, DOM order, optionality, closed and open reading, and native state pass.
evidence.changedCase: A venue note becomes an essential warning.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Collapsible appearance justifies hidden content.
interactions.correctionRoute: Reclassify content priority and widget type.

interactions.title: Choose festival disclosure grouping
interactions.learnerAction: Code or refuse exclusive name grouping based on whether visitors must compare venue requirements and keep related widgets under a heading.
interactions.artifactChange: A justified disclosure-group decision is committed.

evidence.observable: Open-state invariant and simultaneous-comparison need agree.
evidence.changedCase: Task changes from choosing one venue to comparing all.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Exclusive accordion is always more compact and better.
interactions.correctionRoute: Test real comparison and scanning needs.

interactions.title: Test festival disclosure states
interactions.learnerAction: Test keyboard, pointer, touch, focus, boolean open presence, exclusive changes, script loss, reload, print plan, zoom, and long labels.
interactions.artifactChange: Disclosure state and access evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: All content remains understandable and native activation remains operable.
evidence.changedCase: Label doubles and script fails while one item is open.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Pointer click and triangle rotation prove completion.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace each state and input path separately.

interactions.title: Code festival task controls
interactions.learnerAction: Code destinations, commands, disclosures, and selections with native elements chosen from actual task outcomes.
interactions.artifactChange: Native festival controls are committed.

evidence.observable: Role, name, activation, focus, state, destination, and submission semantics match tasks.
evidence.changedCase: A command becomes navigation and a selection becomes information.

interactions.feedbackTarget: All interactions can be styled anchors or divs.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify outcome before control selection.

interactions.title: Test native task parity
interactions.learnerAction: Complete every festival task by keyboard and touch, inspect names and states, disable script, zoom, and test disabled and changed-task cases.
interactions.artifactChange: Native task parity evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Every promised task completes across supported inputs and failure boundaries.
evidence.changedCase: Pointer disappears and one label becomes icon-only.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Role plus tabindex is treated as full parity.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inventory and retest every responsibility.

interactions.title: Run festival mutation suite
interactions.learnerAction: Change hierarchy, parents, fragments, region contexts, composition reuse, disclosure priority, and control outcomes in one unseen bulletin.
interactions.artifactChange: A seven-concept mutation suite is stored.

evidence.observable: Each changed invariant receives a bounded repair without breaking retained behavior.
evidence.changedCase: All mutations recur in a different order.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Broad semantic-element replacement is accepted.
interactions.correctionRoute: Isolate and repair one relationship at a time.

interactions.title: Explain festival transfer
interactions.learnerAction: Explain all seven concept decisions, evidence, repairs, access checks, failure boundaries, and one parallel festival transfer without reopening the workshop.
interactions.artifactChange: The festival bulletin and defense become the faded checkpoint.

evidence.observable: Each claim links purpose, relationship, exposure or behavior, mutation, and consequence.
evidence.changedCase: A festival article becomes a site-wide resource page.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Element inventory replaces causal transfer evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rebuild the weakest claim from task to mutation.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A broken service bulletin gains minimal causal repairs and an incident report spanning hierarchy, models, fragments, landmark exposure, group relationships, disclosure state, and control behavior.
activityDesigns.startingState: The bulletin contains skipped hierarchy, invalid nesting, mutable fragments, duplicate and missing landmarks, div-section-article confusion, broken disclosures, and role-button click traps.
activityDesigns.completionState: Every fault has earliest cause, direct evidence, minimal repair, preserved unaffected behavior, and changed parallel incident.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback identifies the contradicted DOM, accessibility-tree, navigation, state, focus, or task evidence without revealing repair.
activityDesigns.hintContract: On-request hints narrow the incident to one concept and then a smaller parallel trace.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires cause classification, minimal repair, regression evidence, and changed fault before checkpoint reopens.

interactions.title: Predict foundation faults
interactions.learnerAction: Predict outcomes for skipped headings, invalid structural parents, duplicated IDs, vague links, hidden targets, and broken focus continuation before inspection.
interactions.artifactChange: Foundation fault predictions are committed.

evidence.observable: Each prediction maps to outline, DOM, purpose, target, visibility, focus, or continuation evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Faults move into different regions.

interactions.feedbackTarget: All failures are called generic semantic HTML issues.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify hierarchy, relationship, and activation separately.

interactions.title: Repair landmark noise and absence
interactions.learnerAction: Repair multiple main regions, nav around incidental links, unlabeled different navigation, over-labeled identical navigation, aside for unrelated content, and contextual banner and contentinfo overrides.
interactions.artifactChange: Landmark faults receive minimal repairs.

evidence.observable: Purposeful roles, names, hierarchy, contextual absences, and navigation order pass.
evidence.changedCase: Navigation sets and ancestor contexts change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Adding roles and labels everywhere is accepted.
interactions.correctionRoute: Remove noise, then repair purpose and context.

interactions.title: Repair grouping category errors
interactions.learnerAction: Repair cards made article only for styling, every div replaced by section, thematic content without headings, reusable content trapped in generic groups, and unnecessary named regions.
interactions.artifactChange: Grouping faults receive bounded repairs.

evidence.observable: Extraction, outline, generic grouping, landmark exposure, and changed reuse pass.
evidence.changedCase: A reusable card becomes dependent thematic content.

interactions.feedbackTarget: More semantic elements automatically improve structure.
interactions.correctionRoute: Test composition, theme, and generic purpose.

interactions.title: Repair disclosure misuse
interactions.learnerAction: Repair required content hidden by default, menu and dialog impersonation, missing first summary, invalid multiple-open name group, nested same-name details, vague labels, and click-only scripts.
interactions.artifactChange: Disclosure faults receive minimal repairs or widget refusal.

evidence.observable: Purpose, DOM, label, state, group invariant, activation, focus, and script-free behavior pass.
evidence.changedCase: Comparison need makes exclusivity harmful.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Collapsible appearance validates disclosure choice.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify widget type, content priority, and native state.

interactions.title: Repair custom-control traps
interactions.learnerAction: Repair clickable divs, role-button links, missing names, click-only activation, lost focus, false disabled state, nested controls, and broken script-loss tasks with native controls where requirements fit.
interactions.artifactChange: Control traps receive minimal native repairs or documented custom gaps.

evidence.observable: Task, role, name, keyboard, focus, state, result, disabled behavior, and failure boundary pass.
evidence.changedCase: A command becomes navigation and pointer input vanishes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: ARIA role and keydown handler prove equivalence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inventory every promised native responsibility.

interactions.title: Inspect repaired trees and states
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect DOM, outline, landmark inventory, fragment trace, disclosure state, focus order, accessibility names, and task results for contradictions after repair.
interactions.artifactChange: A cross-layer contradiction audit is saved.

evidence.observable: All seven evidence layers agree and no repair masks another fault.
evidence.changedCase: Two repaired regions exchange ancestors.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Rendered screenshot is treated as complete evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare each consumer and interaction layer.

interactions.title: Run changed incident regression
interactions.learnerAction: Move regions, rename headings, change link purpose, extract content, regroup disclosures, disable script, remove pointer, zoom, narrow, reload, and retest repaired behavior.
interactions.artifactChange: A complete incident regression suite is stored.

evidence.observable: All repaired invariants survive mutations, access modes, and reload.
evidence.changedCase: A parallel incident changes all fault locations.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One happy-path rerun passes the clinic.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace the first regression to its earliest cause.

interactions.title: Write region incident report
interactions.learnerAction: Explain each requirement, cause, contradicted evidence, minimal repair, preserved invariant, changed case, and refusal across all seven concepts.
interactions.artifactChange: The repaired bulletin and causal report become the clinic checkpoint.

evidence.observable: Report demonstrates precise causal diagnosis rather than tag substitution.
evidence.changedCase: A second bulletin repeats mechanisms in new contexts.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Report lists changed tags without causes or evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rewrite weakest incident as invariant and mutation.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: An independently built neighborhood news architecture supports region and heading navigation, reusable stories, thematic groups, optional background disclosures, and native tasks.
activityDesigns.startingState: An unseen newsroom brief, verified story packet, hierarchy changes, destination facts, region purposes, background notes, task requirements, deterministic mutations, and empty workspace are provided.
activityDesigns.completionState: The saved site passes all seven contracts, changed editorial cases, keyboard and touch tasks, script loss, narrow widths, persistence, and stakeholder defense without copied structure.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback reports only unmet observable and consequence; it supplies no final structure, labels, disclosure, or control code.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints are available only on request and point to one evidence layer or smaller parallel newsroom case.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires independent diagnosis, minimal repair, and a changed newsroom case before the original checkpoint reopens.

interactions.title: Build newsroom hierarchy
interactions.learnerAction: Build page, desk, story, and background heading ranks from the unseen newsroom content tree.
interactions.artifactChange: A content-derived newsroom outline is committed.

evidence.observable: Unstyled outline and heading navigation match hierarchy.
evidence.changedCase: One desk becomes a nested story topic.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Rank follows typography or component depth.
interactions.correctionRoute: Reconstruct editorial hierarchy before ranks.

interactions.title: Test newsroom models and fragments
interactions.learnerAction: Test all structural parent-child relationships and story, desk, and background fragment links through moved and renamed cases.
interactions.artifactChange: DOM and navigation evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Relationships conform and destinations retain purpose, identity, context, visibility, focus, and continuation.
evidence.changedCase: A story moves desks and changes headline.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Valid-looking source and matching tokens pass.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect parsed relationship and full activation path.

interactions.title: Build newsroom landmarks
interactions.learnerAction: Build site-oriented header, major navigation, one main, related-analysis complementary content, and page-wide footer from purpose and context.
interactions.artifactChange: Newsroom landmarks are committed.

evidence.observable: Roles, scopes, names, order, repeated purposes, and contextual absences match the brief.
evidence.changedCase: Related analysis becomes primary reporting.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visual page zones determine landmarks.
interactions.correctionRoute: Derive region role from relationship and context.

interactions.title: Test newsroom region navigation
interactions.learnerAction: Navigate by landmarks and headings, change repeated navigation sets and ancestor contexts, and test labels, duplicates, usefulness, and reading continuation.
interactions.artifactChange: Region navigation mutation evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Major regions remain concise, distinguishable, and useful after change.
evidence.changedCase: Site and desk navigation become identical.

interactions.feedbackTarget: More named landmarks is treated as better.
interactions.correctionRoute: Remove noise and label exact purpose.

interactions.title: Build newsroom compositions
interactions.learnerAction: Build distributable stories as articles, thematic desks as sections, and layout-only wrappers as generic groups with appropriate headings.
interactions.artifactChange: Newsroom content relationships are committed.

evidence.observable: Extraction, outline, generic grouping, and region exposure match editorial intent.
evidence.changedCase: A story becomes a page-dependent live update.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Every card becomes article and every row section.
interactions.correctionRoute: Test independent composition and thematic outline.

interactions.title: Test editorial regrouping
interactions.learnerAction: Extract stories, merge desks, move metadata, rename headings, remove CSS, linearize, and retest grouping, landmarks, and fragments.
interactions.artifactChange: Editorial regrouping evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Every composition and group remains meaningful after transformation.
evidence.changedCase: Two thematic desks merge into one story package.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Original component boundaries prove semantics.
interactions.correctionRoute: Reclassify after each editorial transformation.

interactions.title: Build optional story background
interactions.learnerAction: Build native disclosures for optional background with first-summary labels, justified independent or exclusive grouping, and essential corrections kept visible.
interactions.artifactChange: Newsroom background disclosures are committed.

evidence.observable: Purpose, label, DOM, state, group invariant, and content priority pass.
evidence.changedCase: Background becomes a required correction.

interactions.feedbackTarget: All secondary-looking content can be hidden.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify priority, widget type, and comparison need.

interactions.title: Test newsroom disclosure access
interactions.learnerAction: Test keyboard, touch, focus, state, exclusivity, script loss, reload, print plan, zoom, narrow width, long labels, and long background content.
interactions.artifactChange: Disclosure access and mutation evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: All optional content remains discoverable, operable, readable, and correctly grouped.
evidence.changedCase: Comparison requires two backgrounds open together.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Pointer opening at desktop width proves access.
interactions.correctionRoute: Test state and access paths independently.

interactions.title: Build native newsroom tasks
interactions.learnerAction: Build story destinations, filter commands, disclosures, and subscription controls with native elements selected from exact task outcomes.
interactions.artifactChange: Native newsroom interactions are committed.

evidence.observable: Role, name, keyboard, focus, state, destination, command, and submission behavior match tasks.
evidence.changedCase: A filter becomes a destination and subscription becomes information.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Clickable styled containers are accepted for flexibility.
interactions.correctionRoute: Select native control from task result.

interactions.title: Test newsroom task completion
interactions.learnerAction: Complete every task by keyboard and touch, inspect names and states, disable script, test disabled behavior, zoom, narrow, and reload.
interactions.artifactChange: Native task-completion evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Tasks remain operable and honest across input, state, enhancement, and layout changes.
evidence.changedCase: Pointer and script disappear during an active task.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Tab focus and click handler prove complete behavior.
interactions.correctionRoute: Test every promised task outcome end to end.

interactions.title: Run adversarial newsroom mutation
interactions.learnerAction: Change hierarchy, parent relationships, fragment identities, landmark contexts, story reuse, disclosure priority, and task outcomes simultaneously without broad rewrite.
interactions.artifactChange: A complete adversarial regression report is stored.

evidence.observable: All seven contracts survive minimal repairs, save, reload, and repeated mutations.
evidence.changedCase: A parallel newsroom reverses every mutation order.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Original happy path is accepted as transfer.
interactions.correctionRoute: Isolate first failed invariant and preserve others.

interactions.title: Defend newsroom architecture
interactions.learnerAction: Defend every heading, relationship, fragment, landmark, grouping, disclosure, control, refusal, access result, persistence result, and changed-case outcome.
interactions.artifactChange: The newsroom site and evidence-backed defense become the lab checkpoint.

evidence.observable: Every claim links requirement, decision, observable evidence, consequence, and mutation.
evidence.changedCase: Stakeholder requests more regions, hidden corrections, and custom div controls.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Defense lists semantic tags without user evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rewrite weakest claim from task through consequence.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A delayed retrieval record demonstrates all seven concepts across unseen region, grouping, disclosure, and control traces without earlier artifacts.
activityDesigns.startingState: Unseen outlines, DOM traces, fragment activations, landmark inventories, content packets, disclosure states, and task traces are provided without notes.
activityDesigns.completionState: The learner retrieves all seven concepts, corrects misconceptions causally, and transfers them after delay.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback names missed concept and observable only after commitment and never supplies final structure or control.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Optional retrieval hints point to one evidence layer or smaller parallel item without revealing answer.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss routes to one concept-sized correction and different changed item before original checkpoint reopens.

interactions.title: Retrieve heading hierarchy
interactions.learnerAction: Reconstruct heading ranks for an unseen tenant notice after sections change depth.
interactions.artifactChange: A delayed outline decision is committed.

evidence.observable: Ranks match content relationships without styling.
evidence.changedCase: A subsection becomes a peer.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Rank follows appearance or tag sequence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Reconstruct the complete content tree.

interactions.title: Predict content relationships
interactions.learnerAction: Predict parsed and conforming relationships for unseen structural, summary, link, and interactive parent changes.
interactions.artifactChange: Delayed relationship predictions are committed.

evidence.observable: Predictions match exact context, model, and DOM.
evidence.changedCase: An interactive descendant changes parent.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visual nesting predicts conformance.
interactions.correctionRoute: Apply content category and contextual restrictions.

interactions.title: Retrieve fragment task path
interactions.learnerAction: Resolve purpose, stable target, heading context, visibility, focus, and continuation for unseen moved-region links.
interactions.artifactChange: Delayed fragment decisions are committed.

evidence.observable: Every activation supports the intended navigation task.
evidence.changedCase: Target becomes closed optional content.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Hash change alone proves navigation.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace activation through task continuation.

interactions.title: Retrieve landmark exposure
interactions.learnerAction: Predict roles, names, scopes, and absences for body-level and nested regions in an unseen page.
interactions.artifactChange: Delayed landmark decisions are committed.

evidence.observable: Exposure follows purpose, context, implicit semantics, and naming.
evidence.changedCase: Header and footer move into an article.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Tag presence always creates a landmark.
interactions.correctionRoute: Evaluate ancestor context and purpose.

interactions.title: Correct landmark labeling noise
interactions.learnerAction: Correct a response that labels roles with role words, uniquely renames identical navigation, leaves different navigation indistinguishable, and makes every section a region.
interactions.artifactChange: A causal landmark correction is stored.

evidence.observable: Names communicate purpose and landmark set remains useful rather than noisy.
evidence.changedCase: The two navigation link sets become identical.

interactions.feedbackTarget: More labels and landmarks are always better.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare purpose, content, and navigation value.

interactions.title: Retrieve grouping boundaries
interactions.learnerAction: Route unseen standalone compositions, thematic groups, generic wrappers, major navigation, and complementary content to article, section, div, nav, aside, or another appropriate element.
interactions.artifactChange: Delayed grouping routes are committed.

evidence.observable: Routes follow reuse, outline, generic grouping, or named landmark purpose.
evidence.changedCase: Standalone content becomes styling-only grouping.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Semantic element density is treated as quality.
interactions.correctionRoute: Test composition, theme, and element-specific purpose.

interactions.title: Correct section and article substitution
interactions.learnerAction: Correct every-card article, every-div section, headingless thematic group, redundant named region, and reusable content trapped in a generic wrapper.
interactions.artifactChange: A causal grouping correction is stored.

evidence.observable: Extraction, outline, generic grouping, and exposure evidence justify each correction.
evidence.changedCase: A thematic group becomes reusable independently.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Swapping tags until audit is quiet is accepted.
interactions.correctionRoute: Reclassify underlying content relationship.

interactions.title: Predict disclosure state and fit
interactions.learnerAction: Predict suitability, first-summary label, boolean state, activation, focus, exclusive group changes, script-free behavior, and comparison consequences for unseen disclosures.
interactions.artifactChange: Delayed disclosure predictions are committed.

evidence.observable: Widget purpose, DOM, state, group invariant, and access behavior agree.
evidence.changedCase: Optional content becomes required and comparison need changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Any accordion-looking requirement uses details.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify widget, priority, and grouping need.

interactions.title: Correct disclosure misuse
interactions.learnerAction: Correct a menu built with details, missing first summary, required hidden warning, misleading multiple-open group, and click-only toggle script.
interactions.artifactChange: A causal disclosure correction is stored.

evidence.observable: Correct widget type, content visibility, native label, state, group, and activation pass.
evidence.changedCase: The task changes from menu to optional information.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Adding ARIA and key handlers repairs every misuse.
interactions.correctionRoute: Choose the correct native task model first.

interactions.title: Retrieve native control contracts
interactions.learnerAction: Choose controls for navigation, command, disclosure, submission, selection, and information tasks and enumerate role, name, keyboard, focus, state, result, disabled, and script-loss evidence.
interactions.artifactChange: Delayed task-to-control decisions are committed.

evidence.observable: Native selection and every custom responsibility follow exact task outcomes.
evidence.changedCase: Command becomes destination and pointer disappears.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Role and tabindex create native behavior.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inventory task result and promised responsibilities.

interactions.title: Explain delayed region model
interactions.learnerAction: Explain all seven concepts, their dependencies, common confusions, evidence, corrections, and one unseen information-architecture transfer without notes.
interactions.artifactChange: The delayed retrieval record becomes the review checkpoint.

evidence.observable: Explanation links content purpose, DOM, exposure, state, behavior, access, mutation, and refusal.
evidence.changedCase: A new public notice combines all region and control patterns.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Element-name inventory substitutes for mental model.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rebuild weakest concept from task to changed evidence.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: An independently completed civic-alert page demonstrates all seven concepts through answers, code, causal debugging, persistence, changed-case transfer, and defense.
activityDesigns.startingState: An unseen civic brief, content tree, destination facts, region purposes, reusable alerts, optional background, task requirements, deterministic faults, and empty workspace are provided.
activityDesigns.completionState: Candidate independently demonstrates all seven concepts under original and changed conditions with no instructional assistance.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Assessment feedback records only pass or failed requirement and observable; no canonical structure, label, disclosure, control, or repair is disclosed.
activityDesigns.hintContract: No instructional hints, staged clues, example answers, or code completion are available during checkpoint.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A failed item closes and records its evidence gap for later relearning plus a different parallel form.

interactions.title: Derive civic hierarchy
interactions.learnerAction: Derive heading ranks for an unseen civic alert after sections change depth and defend the unstyled outline.
interactions.artifactChange: An independent hierarchy answer is committed.

evidence.observable: Ranks match content relationships before and after movement.
evidence.changedCase: A nested update becomes a peer.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Rank follows typography or component nesting.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record heading-hierarchy evidence gap.

interactions.title: Debug civic relationships
interactions.learnerAction: Diagnose and minimally repair invalid structural, summary, link, and interactive relationships in an unseen parsed alert page.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent relationship repairs are committed.

evidence.observable: Intended DOM and conformance survive changed parents.
evidence.changedCase: An interactive descendant moves into summary.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Rendered output alone proves relationships.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record content-model evidence gap.

interactions.title: Debug civic fragments
interactions.learnerAction: Repair vague purpose, duplicate target, mutable identity, hidden target, obscured focus, and broken continuation for unseen alert links.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent fragment repairs are committed.

evidence.observable: Purpose, identity, context, visibility, focus, and continuation pass after movement.
evidence.changedCase: Target moves into optional content and title changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Matching href and id tokens prove navigation.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record fragment-navigation evidence gap.

interactions.title: Plan civic landmarks
interactions.learnerAction: Choose page and contextual landmarks, intentional absences, repeated-region labels, and navigation boundaries from an unseen civic brief.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent landmark decisions are committed.

evidence.observable: Purpose, context, implicit role, name, hierarchy, and duplicate policy agree.
evidence.changedCase: Support content moves into main and nav sets become identical.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visual page zones select landmark elements.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record landmark-exposure evidence gap.

interactions.title: Debug civic landmark inventory
interactions.learnerAction: Repair missing main, multiple main, incidental nav, unrelated aside, contextual banner and contentinfo overrides, noisy regions, and ambiguous repeated purposes.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent landmark repairs are committed.

evidence.observable: Landmark inventory and navigation remain useful, bounded, and context-correct.
evidence.changedCase: Ancestor contexts and navigation purposes change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Adding roles and labels everywhere passes.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record landmark-inventory evidence gap.

interactions.title: Classify civic content groups
interactions.learnerAction: Classify unseen alerts, topic groups, layout wrappers, major navigation, and supporting content as article, section, div, nav, aside, or another appropriate element.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent grouping decisions are committed.

evidence.observable: Each route follows standalone reuse, thematic outline, generic grouping, or named purpose.
evidence.changedCase: A reusable alert becomes page-dependent status.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Cards use article and rows use section.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record sectioning-relationship evidence gap.

interactions.title: Code and mutate civic groups
interactions.learnerAction: Code classified groups, then extract, merge, move, rename, remove styles, and retest headings, landmarks, models, and fragments.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent group implementation and mutation evidence are committed.

evidence.observable: Relationships remain correct through composition and outline changes.
evidence.changedCase: Two thematic groups merge into one distributable bulletin.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Initial component shape proves semantics.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record grouping-transfer evidence gap.

interactions.title: Plan civic disclosure behavior
interactions.learnerAction: Choose or reject details for optional information, required warnings, menu, dialog, footnote, comparison, and independent disclosure cases; specify label, state, and grouping.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent disclosure decisions are committed.

evidence.observable: Widget fit, content priority, first-summary label, boolean state, and group need agree.
evidence.changedCase: Optional context becomes required and comparison becomes selection.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Any collapsible requirement uses details.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record disclosure-fit evidence gap.

interactions.title: Debug civic disclosures
interactions.learnerAction: Repair invalid summary order, hidden required content, menu impersonation, multiple-open exclusive group, nested same-name details, vague labels, and click-only toggling.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent disclosure repairs are committed.

evidence.observable: Purpose, DOM, label, state, grouping, keyboard, focus, script-free, and comparison behavior pass.
evidence.changedCase: Grouping need and label length change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: ARIA and scripts repair wrong widget choice.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record disclosure-state evidence gap.

interactions.title: Select civic native controls
interactions.learnerAction: Choose controls for navigation, commands, disclosures, submission, selection, and information and specify the full behavior evidence required for any custom exception.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent native-control decisions are committed.

evidence.observable: Task outcome, semantics, name, keyboard, focus, state, disabled, submission, and script boundary agree.
evidence.changedCase: Command becomes navigation and pointer disappears.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Role and click behavior create native parity.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record native-control-selection evidence gap.

interactions.title: Code and test civic tasks
interactions.learnerAction: Code native civic tasks and test keyboard, touch, names, focus, state, destination, command, disabled behavior, script loss, zoom, narrow width, save, and reload.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent task implementation and evidence are committed.

evidence.observable: Every task completes honestly across input, state, enhancement, layout, and persistence changes.
evidence.changedCase: Pointer and script fail while task order reverses.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One pointer happy path proves task completion.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record native-task evidence gap.

interactions.title: Defend civic architecture mastery
interactions.learnerAction: Defend every heading, relationship, fragment, landmark, grouping, disclosure, control, refusal, repair, access result, persistence result, and changed-case transfer without instructional help.
interactions.artifactChange: The civic page and defense become the independent assessment record.

evidence.observable: Every claim links requirement, decision or refusal, evidence, user consequence, and mutation.
evidence.changedCase: A parallel civic brief changes all region and task requirements.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Tag inventory or appearance substitutes for mastery.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record weakest claim for relearning and parallel form.

authorshipBoundary.interpretation: This artifact fixes interaction intent and evidence before authoring; it is neither publishable learner content nor a source for automatic prose generation.

gaps: Independent subject, instructional-design, assessment, accessibility, responsive, assistive-technology, and duplication reviews are not yet complete.

Learner-facing copy, source and state fixtures, landmark and accessibility-tree simulators, canonical answers, executable checks, browser and assistive-technology verification, and learner pilots remain unauthored.
